title: peptide_v1 — PEPTIDE sub-axis output rows
description: Output schema for _python_bridge/module/peptide_sim.py. One row per therapeutic-peptide model: the Zimm-Bragg helix-coil partition function, the fractional helicity theta_H, the sigma->1 independent-residue cross-check, and the helicity/permeability tradeoff proxy. Anchored to Zimm-Bragg / Lifson-Roig helix-coil statistical-mechanics theory. PEPTIDE is a SUB-AXIS :> WEAVE (core, AXIS/HIERARCHY.tape @D sub_under_weave) on the ~30% WEAVE-overlap demotion boundary — NOT a hexa-bio core-5 axis; core-5 (AXIS/AXIS.tape) UNCHANGED. In-silico simulator-consistency only (AGENTS.tape g8/f2).

peptide.description: Peptide identifier within the deterministic panel.

sequence.description: One-letter amino-acid sequence of the model peptide (illustrative, not a literal drug sequence).

modality_note.description: Short description of the modelled peptide modality.

drug_precedent.description: Own drug precedent for the modality (g3/f1 — described by precedent, never lattice-derived).

sigma_nucleation.description: Zimm-Bragg helix-nucleation parameter sigma (<< 1 makes the helix-coil transition cooperative).

n_residues.description: Number of residues in the peptide chain.

partition_Z.description: Helix-coil partition function Z = sum over 2^N helix/coil microstates of sigma^(#nucleations) * product s_i.

mean_helical_residues.description: Boltzmann-weighted mean number of helical residues.

fractional_helicity.description: Fractional helicity theta_H = <#helical residues> / N; a fraction, bounded to [0,1] by the real limit.

independent_residue_helicity.description: sigma->1 closed-form non-cooperative baseline theta_H = (1/N) sum s_i/(1+s_i); cross-check upper bound.

cooperativity_suppresses_helix.description: True iff fractional_helicity <= independent_residue_helicity (a nucleation penalty can only suppress helix).

polar_residue_fraction.description: Fraction of residues with a solvent-exposable polar backbone amide.

exposed_polar_fraction.description: Polar fraction weighted by the fraction of residues not in the helical (H-bond-satisfied) state.

permeability_proxy.description: Illustrative helicity/permeability tradeoff index in [0,1]; rises with helicity, falls with exposed polar groups. NOT a measured logP or Papp.
